          +------------------------------+
          |  Outer ------------------+   |
          |   |  Inner               |   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   |   +--------------+   |   |
          |   |   |  Deep        |   |   |
          |   |   |              |   |   |
+------+  |   |   |  +--------+  |   |   |        +-------+
|  In  +--+---+---+->|  Node  +--+---+---+------->|  Out  |
+------+  |   |   |  +--------+  |   |   |        +-------+
          |   |   |              |   |   |
          |   |   |              |   |   |
          |   |   +--------------+   |   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   +----------------------+   |
          |                              |
          |                              |
          |                              |
          |                              |
          |                              |
          |                              |
          +------------------------------+
